<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap');
:root {
    --lg-bg: #f2f7fb;
  --lg-surface: #ffffff;
    --lg-ink: #0b1726;
        --lg-ink-soft: #2f455c;
  --lg-line: #dbe6ef;
    --lg-blue: #004b93;
    --lg-cyan: #00a8dd;
    --lg-navy: #07111d;
    --lg-midnight: #0a1d33;
}
html, body { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif !important; font-size: 16px; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
h1, h2, h3, h4, .lg9-title, .lg9-title-md { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', 'Manrope', sans-serif !important; }
.page-id-4701 .wp-block-post-title,

.lg9 { color: var(--lg-ink); overflow-x: hidden; }
.lg9 * { box-sizing: border-box; }
.lg9 a { text-decoration: none; }
.lg9 img { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
.lg9-shell { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
.lg9-narrow { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
.lg9-kicker { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2.4px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--lg-cyan); }
.lg9-title { font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5.8vw, 5.4rem); line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -2px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; }
.lg9-title-md { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.2vw, 3.5rem); line-height: 1.06; letter-spacing: -1.2px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; }
.lg9-copy { color: var(--lg-ink-soft); line-height: 1.82; font-size: 1.08rem; }
.lg9-hero-lead { font-size: clamp(1.02rem, 1.6vw, 1.15rem); line-height: 1.88; max-width: 720px; }
.lg9-divider { height: 56px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(0,75,147,.08) 100%); clip-path: polygon(0 25%, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%); }
.lg9-btns { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; }
.lg9-btn-primary, .lg9-btn-secondary { position:relative; overflow:hidden; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; padding:14px 22px; min-height: 50px; border-radius:12px; font-weight:800; font-size:15px; line-height:1.1; transition: transform .22s ease, box-shadow .22s ease, background .22s ease; }
.lg9-btn-primary::before, .lg9-btn-secondary::before { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; left:-120%; width:90%; height:100%; background:linear-gradient(105deg, transparent 0%, rgba(255,255,255,.22) 48%, transparent 100%); transition:left .45s ease; }
.lg9-btn-primary:hover::before, .lg9-btn-secondary:hover::before { left:130%; }
.lg9-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--lg-blue), var(--lg-cyan)); color:#fff; box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(0,75,147,.28); }
.lg9-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0,75,147,.36); }
.lg9-btn-secondary { border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.46); color:#fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); }
.lg9-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.22); }
.lg9-card { background: var(--lg-surface); border:1px solid var(--lg-line); border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(13,27,42,.08); transition: transform .22s ease, box-shadow .22s ease; }
.lg9-card > :first-child { margin-top: 0 !important; }
.lg9-card > :last-child { margin-bottom: 0 !important; }
.lg9-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 22px 50px rgba(13,27,42,.12); }
.lg9-media { overflow:hidden; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 22px 52px rgba(13,27,42,.14); }
.lg9-media img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition: transform .55s ease; }
.lg9-media:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
.lg9-grid-2 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(22px, 3vw, 28px); }
.lg9-grid-3 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(18px, 2.2vw, 22px); }
.lg9-logo-strip { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; gap:20px 36px; align-items:center; }
.lg9-logo-strip img { max-height:52px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter: grayscale(100%) opacity(.75); }
/* Marquee / infinite ticker */
.lg9-marquee-wrap { overflow:hidden; width:100%; position:relative; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before, .lg9-marquee-wrap::after { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0; width:80px; z-index:2; pointer-events:none; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before { left:0; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::after  { right:0; background:linear-gradient(270deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-track { display:flex; width:max-content; animation: lg9Marquee 38s linear infinite; will-change: transform; }
.lg9-marquee-track:hover { animation-play-state: paused; }
.lg9-marquee-inner { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:52px; padding:0 26px; }
.lg9-marquee-inner img { max-height:50px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter:grayscale(100%) opacity(.68); transition:filter .2s ease; }
.lg9-marquee-inner img:hover { filter:grayscale(0%) opacity(1); }
@keyframes lg9Marquee { from { transform:translateX(0); } to { transform:translateX(-50%); } }
.lg9-hero { position: relative; min-height: 84vh; display:flex; align-items:center; background:#09131f; }
.lg9-hero-bg { position:absolute; inset:0; }
.lg9-hero-bg img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; opacity:.4; }
.lg9-hero-overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; background: linear-gradient(112deg, rgba(8,18,29,.97) 0%, rgba(10,30,50,.9) 52%, rgba(0,85,165,.62) 100%); }
.lg9-hero-inner { position:relative; z-index:2; width:100%; padding: 88px 0 76px; }
.lg9-hero-inner p { color: rgba(255,255,255,.9) !important; }
.lg9-hero-inner .lg9-stat-panel p { color: #1c2e43 !important; }
.lg9-stat-panel { background: rgba(255,255,255,.94); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4); border-radius: 24px; padding: 20px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); }
.lg9-stat-big { font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 6vw, 4.8rem); line-height: 1; font-weight: 900; color: var(--lg-ink); }
.lg9-section { padding: clamp(60px, 7vw, 82px) 0; }
.lg9-section-soft { padding: clamp(60px, 7vw, 82px) 0; background: var(--lg-bg); }
.lg9-callout { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.lg9-callout::after { content:""; position:absolute; inset:auto -10% -40% auto; width:240px; height:240px; border-radius:999px; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(138,216,255,.18) 0%, rgba(138,216,255,0) 70%); pointer-events:none; }
.lg9-step { display:flex; gap: 14px; align-items:flex-start; }
.lg9-step-num { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lg-blue),var(--lg-cyan)); color:#fff; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-weight:800; flex-shrink:0; transition: transform .2s ease; }
.lg9-step:hover .lg9-step-num { transform: scale(1.08); }
.lg9-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:7px 12px; border-radius:999px; background:#e8f4ff; color: var(--lg-blue); font-size:12px; font-weight:800; }
.lg9-pill::before { content: ""; width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:999px; background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lg-blue),var(--lg-cyan)); }
.lg9-form-note { font-size: 13px; color: #3f5873; margin-top: 12px; }
.lg9-card blockquote { border-left: 3px solid rgba(0,168,221,.4); padding-left: 16px; }
.lg9-video-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr)); gap: 22px; }
.lg9-video-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid var(--lg-line); border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(13,27,42,.08); }
.lg9-frame { aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; background:#09131f; }
.lg9-frame iframe { width:100%; height:100%; border:0; display:block; }
.lg9-video-hero { display:grid; gap: 18px; }
@media (min-width: 901px) { .lg9-video-hero { grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr; align-items: start; } }
.lg9-video-feature { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #0a1727 0%, #112f4f 55%, #0d4f95 100%); border-radius: 24px; padding: 12px; box-shadow: 0 26px 60px rgba(9, 27, 45, .22); }
.lg9-video-feature .lg9-frame { border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 16 / 8.7; }
.lg9-video-hero-copy { background: #ffffff; color: var(--lg-ink); border-radius: 20px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #deebf6; box-shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(9, 27, 45, .08); }
.lg9-video-hero-copy .lg9-copy { color: var(--lg-ink-soft); }
.lg9-video-meta { display:grid; gap: 12px; margin-top: 18px; }
.lg9-video-meta-card { padding: 14px 16px; border-radius: 16px; background: #f4f9ff; border: 1px solid #dbe9f7; }
.lg9-video-meta-card strong { display:block; margin-bottom: 4px; color: #14314b; }
.lg9-video-library-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:end; gap:18px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom: 22px; }
.lg9-video-card-body { padding:18px 18px 20px; }
.lg9-video-card-body strong { display:block; margin-bottom:6px; }
.lg9-gallery { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap:18px; }
.lg9-gallery .lg9-media { aspect-ratio: 16 / 12; }
.lg9-gallery--mosaic .lg9-media:nth-child(3n+1) { aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; }
.lg9-gallery--mosaic .lg9-media:nth-child(3n+2) { aspect-ratio: 4 / 5; }
.lg9-gallery--mosaic .lg9-media:nth-child(3n+3) { aspect-ratio: 16 / 12; }
.lg9-gallery-band { display:grid; gap: 18px; }
.lg9-gallery-lead { display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1.35fr .9fr; gap: 18px; align-items: stretch; }
.lg9-gallery-lead .lg9-media:first-child { aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; }
.lg9-gallery-lead .lg9-media:last-child { aspect-ratio: 4 / 5; }
.lg9-gallery-caption { display:grid; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.lg9-gallery-note { color: #516779; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.65; }
.lg9-gallery-chip-row { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; margin-top:14px; }
.lg9-gallery-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; padding:8px 12px; border-radius:999px; background:#eaf3fb; color:#22415b; font-size:12px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:.2px; }
.lg9-topbar { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #061120, #113054); color: rgba(255,255,255,.85); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .3px; }
.lg9-topbar-inner { max-width:1280px; margin:0 auto; padding:8px 24px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:14px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.wp-site-blocks > header.wp-block-template-part { position: sticky; top:0; z-index: 990; background: rgba(255,255,255,.94); border-bottom:1px solid #dce8f2; backdrop-filter: blur(13px); }
.wp-site-blocks > header .lg9-head { max-width:1280px; margin:0 auto; padding:12px 24px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:24px; }
.wp-site-blocks > header .lg9-head img { width: 236px; height:auto; image-rendering:-webkit-optimize-contrast; }
.wp-site-blocks > header .lg9-head-nav { flex:1 1 auto; display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; align-items:center; gap:18px; }
.wp-site-blocks > header .wp-block-navigation { margin:0; }
.wp-site-blocks > header .wp-block-navigation-item__content { padding:8px 10px; border-radius:8px; font-size:14px !important; font-weight:700 !important; color:var(--lg-ink) !important; transition: all .2s ease; }
.wp-site-blocks > header .wp-block-navigation-item__content:hover { background:#edf6ff; color:var(--lg-blue) !important; }
.wp-site-blocks > header .wp-block-navigation-submenu__toggle { color:var(--lg-ink) !important; }
.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer { background: radial-gradient(130% 160% at 0% 0%, #133b62 0%, #081624 52%, #050e1a 100%); color:rgba(255,255,255,.82); padding: 44px 24px 20px; }
.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer-grid { max-width:1280px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.6fr 1fr 1fr; gap:24px; }
.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer h3 { color:#fff; font-size:14px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1.3px; margin-bottom:12px; }
.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer ul { list-style:none; padding:0; margin:0; }
.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer li, .wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer p { margin:0; font-size:14px; line-height:1.65; }
.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer a { color:rgba(255,255,255,.88); }
.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer a:hover { color:#9ddfff; }
.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer-base { max-width:1280px; margin:16px auto 0; padding-top:12px; border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); font-size:12px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.58); display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.lg9-footer-chip-wrap { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; margin-top:14px; }
.lg9-footer-chip { padding:7px 10px; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2); color:rgba(255,255,255,.88); font-size:12px; }
.lg9-footer-cta { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin-top:14px; padding:10px 14px; border-radius:10px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f4f92,#0f76c2); color:#fff !important; font-weight:800; font-size:13px; }
.lg9-hero-trust { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px 22px; margin-top:20px; }
.lg9-hero-trust-item { font-size:12.5px; font-weight:700; color:rgba(255,255,255,.72); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; letter-spacing:.1px; }
.lg9-hero-trust-item::before { content:"✓"; color:#4fe8a0; font-size:14px; font-weight:900; }
.lg9-prefooter { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0e2138 0%,#0d3d6b 55%,#0055a5 100%); padding:52px 24px; }
.lg9-prefooter-inner { max-width:1280px; margin:0 auto; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:28px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.lg9-prefooter-copy { flex:1 1 380px; }
.lg9 .lg9-section, .lg9 .lg9-section-soft { animation: lg9FadeUp .75s ease both; }
.lg9 .lg9-section:nth-of-type(2), .lg9 .lg9-section-soft:nth-of-type(2) { animation-delay: .08s; }
.lg9 .lg9-section:nth-of-type(3), .lg9 .lg9-section-soft:nth-of-type(3) { animation-delay: .14s; }
.lg9 .lg9-section:nth-of-type(4), .lg9 .lg9-section-soft:nth-of-type(4) { animation-delay: .2s; }
.lg9-grid-3 > .lg9-card { animation: lg9FadeUp .65s ease both; }
.lg9-grid-3 > .lg9-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: .09s; }
.lg9-grid-3 > .lg9-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: .16s; }
.lg9-hero-bg img { animation: lg9HeroZoom 8s ease-out both; }
@keyframes lg9FadeUp {
    from { opacity:0; transform: translateY(16px); }
    to { opacity:1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
@keyframes lg9HeroZoom {
    from { transform: scale(1.08); }
    to { transform: scale(1); }
}
.ir-rich img { width:min(280px,100%); height:auto; border-radius:16px; }
.page-id-5668 .wp-block-post-content,
.page-id-5651 .wp-block-post-content,
.page-id-5686 .wp-block-post-content,
.page-id-5716 .wp-block-post-content { max-width: 1160px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 48px 24px 82px; }
.page-id-5668 .wp-block-post-content h1,
.page-id-5651 .wp-block-post-content h1,
.page-id-5686 .wp-block-post-content h1,
.page-id-5716 .wp-block-post-content h1,
.page-id-5668 .wp-block-post-content h2,
.page-id-5651 .wp-block-post-content h2,
.page-id-5686 .wp-block-post-content h2,
.page-id-5716 .wp-block-post-content h2,
.page-id-5668 .wp-block-post-content h3,
.page-id-5651 .wp-block-post-content h3,
.page-id-5686 .wp-block-post-content h3,
.page-id-5716 .wp-block-post-content h3 { color: var(--lg-ink); line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -.3px; }
.page-id-5668 .wp-block-post-content p,
.page-id-5651 .wp-block-post-content p,
.page-id-5686 .wp-block-post-content p,
.page-id-5716 .wp-block-post-content p,
.page-id-5668 .wp-block-post-content li,
.page-id-5651 .wp-block-post-content li,
.page-id-5686 .wp-block-post-content li,
.page-id-5716 .wp-block-post-content li { color: var(--lg-ink-soft); font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.75; }
.page-id-5668 .wp-block-post-content a,
.page-id-5651 .wp-block-post-content a,
.page-id-5686 .wp-block-post-content a,
.page-id-5716 .wp-block-post-content a { color: var(--lg-blue); font-weight: 700; }
.page-id-5668 .wp-block-post-content table,
.page-id-5651 .wp-block-post-content table,
.page-id-5686 .wp-block-post-content table,
.page-id-5716 .wp-block-post-content table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background: #fff; border:1px solid var(--lg-line); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; }
.page-id-5668 .wp-block-post-content td,
.page-id-5651 .wp-block-post-content td,
.page-id-5686 .wp-block-post-content td,
.page-id-5716 .wp-block-post-content td,
.page-id-5668 .wp-block-post-content th,
.page-id-5651 .wp-block-post-content th,
.page-id-5686 .wp-block-post-content th,
.page-id-5716 .wp-block-post-content th { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lg-line); padding: 12px 14px; text-align: left; }

/* Investor pages redesign shell (presentation only, source copy preserved) */
.page-id-5668 .wp-block-post-content,
.page-id-5651 .wp-block-post-content,
.page-id-5686 .wp-block-post-content,
.page-id-5716 .wp-block-post-content {
    max-width: none !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    background: #edf4fb;
}

.ir-shell {
    background: radial-gradient(130% 120% at 100% 0%, #edf6ff 0%, #f8fbff 46%, #ecf3fb 100%);
    color: var(--lg-ink);
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 360px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    padding: 74px 0 102px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #0c1d30;
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero-bg,
.ir-shell .ir-hero-bg img {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero-bg img {
    object-fit: cover;
    opacity: .36;
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(118deg, rgba(5,16,28,.94) 0%, rgba(9,34,60,.86) 56%, rgba(0,85,165,.56) 100%);
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero-inner {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero h1 {
    color: #fff;
    margin: 10px 0 12px;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.8vw, 3.5rem);
    line-height: 1.03;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero p {
    margin: 0;
    max-width: 820px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,.86);
    line-height: 1.78;
    font-size: 1.02rem;
}

.ir-shell .ir-content-wrap {
    max-width: 1220px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 24px 84px;
}

.ir-shell .ir-content-panel {
    margin-top: -64px;
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid #dbe7f2;
    border-radius: 24px;
    box-shadow: 0 24px 56px rgba(7, 27, 47, .12);
    padding: clamp(22px, 2.6vw, 34px);
}

.ir-shell .ir-toolbar {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    padding-bottom: 14px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #e4edf6;
}

.ir-shell .ir-toolbar-links {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 8px;
}

.ir-shell .ir-toolbar-links a {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 7px 12px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: #eaf3fd;
    color: #1e456d;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: .2px;
}

.ir-shell .ir-toolbar-note {
    color: #4a637d;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.ir-shell .ir-source-content h1,
.ir-shell .ir-source-content h2,
.ir-shell .ir-source-content h3,
.ir-shell .ir-source-content h4 {
    color: #0c2238;
    letter-spacing: -.35px;
    line-height: 1.15;
}

.ir-shell .ir-source-content p,
.ir-shell .ir-source-content li {
    color: #29445f;
    line-height: 1.8;
    font-size: 1rem;
}

/* Financials + Press: normalize card text rhythm inside Elementor stacks */

</style>
<div class="lg9">
<section class="lg9-hero" style="min-height:52vh;">
  <div class="lg9-hero-bg"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/lg-about-westin-hilton-head-scaled.jpg" alt="LounGenie deployed at The Grove Resort poolside cabana" fetchpriority="high"></div>
  <div class="lg9-hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="lg9-hero-inner">
    <div class="lg9-shell">
      <p class="lg9-kicker">Features</p>
      <h1 class="lg9-title-md" style="color:#fff;margin:10px 0 14px;">ORDER. STASH. CHARGE. CHILL. In One Unit.</h1>
      <p style="max-width:850px;line-height:1.85;color:rgba(255,255,255,.88);">The LounGenie solves the four friction points that cost pool operators the most revenue, right at the guest’s seat, in one commercial-grade unit with zero upfront cost.</p>
      <div class="lg9-hero-trust">
        <span class="lg9-hero-trust-item">$0 Upfront Cost</span>
        <span class="lg9-hero-trust-item">Solar-Powered Charging</span>
        <span class="lg9-hero-trust-item">PoolSafe Installs & Services</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="lg9-section-soft">
  <div class="lg9-shell" style="display:grid;gap:22px;">

    <!-- ORDER -->
    <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
      <div class="lg9-grid-2" style="align-items:center;">
        <div class="lg9-media" style="aspect-ratio:16/10;"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/lg-contact-owc-cabana-scaled.jpg" alt="LounGenie QR ordering at the cabana seat" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div>
          <span class="lg9-pill">ORDER</span>
          <h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="font-size:2rem;margin:12px 0;">QR ordering at the seat, with dedicated staff alerts.</h2>
          <p class="lg9-kicker" style="color:#c44;margin:14px 0 6px;">The Problem</p>
          <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Every time a guest walks to the bar to order, you lose a cabana rental minute and a potential upsell. Your staff can’t cover every lounge chair fast enough during peak hours.</p>
          <p class="lg9-kicker" style="color:#0a6940;margin:0 0 6px;">The Solution</p>
          <p class="lg9-copy">Guests scan a QR code to order food and drinks and the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. A built-in service call button sends a separate alert to the staff touchscreen showing exactly which cabana needs attention. No app download. No POS integration. No added labor.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STASH -->
    <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
      <div class="lg9-grid-2" style="align-items:center;">
        <div>
          <span class="lg9-pill">STASH</span>
          <h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="font-size:2rem;margin:12px 0;">A waterproof safe that keeps guests on the deck.</h2>
          <p class="lg9-kicker" style="color:#c44;margin:14px 0 6px;">The Problem</p>
          <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Guests drape towels over their belongings and glance back every five minutes. Some skip the pool entirely. Cabana dwell time drops — and so does your per-guest spend.</p>
          <p class="lg9-kicker" style="color:#0a6940;margin:0 0 6px;">The Solution</p>
          <p class="lg9-copy">A waterproof safe with a waterproof keypad lets guests lock phones, wallets, and room keys inside the cabana. When guests feel secure, they swim, relax, and stay on the deck far longer. Properties consistently report that STASH is the single feature guests mention most in reviews.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="lg9-media" style="aspect-ratio:16/10;"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/IMG_2071.jpeg" alt="LounGenie STASH — built-in waterproof locking safe with waterproof keypad" loading="lazy"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CHARGE -->
    <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
      <div class="lg9-grid-2" style="align-items:center;">
        <div class="lg9-media" style="aspect-ratio:16/10;"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/IMG_2073.jpeg" alt="LounGenie CHARGE — solar-powered USB charging ports at the cabana seat" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div>
          <span class="lg9-pill">CHARGE</span>
          <h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="font-size:2rem;margin:12px 0;">Solar-powered charging — no wiring, no permits.</h2>
          <p class="lg9-kicker" style="color:#c44;margin:14px 0 6px;">The Problem</p>
          <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin-bottom:14px;">A dead phone means no mobile ordering, no social media posts tagging your property, and no digital room key access. Guests with dying batteries leave the pool to find an outlet — and often don’t come back.</p>
          <p class="lg9-kicker" style="color:#0a6940;margin:0 0 6px;">The Solution</p>
          <p class="lg9-copy">Solar panels power the USB charging ports from sunrise to sunset — no wiring, no permits, no electricity cost. When guests can charge poolside, they stop leaving the pool area. And when they stay, they order.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CHILL -->
    <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
      <div class="lg9-grid-2" style="align-items:center;">
        <div>
          <span class="lg9-pill">CHILL</span>
          <h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="font-size:2rem;margin:12px 0;">Cold drinks at arm’s reach all afternoon.</h2>
          <p class="lg9-kicker" style="color:#c44;margin:14px 0 6px;">The Problem</p>
          <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin-bottom:14px;">When a guest’s drink gets warm, they have two choices: walk to the bar for a new one or settle for what they have. Either way, you lose an impulse purchase.</p>
          <p class="lg9-kicker" style="color:#0a6940;margin:0 0 6px;">The Solution</p>
          <p class="lg9-copy">A removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold at the seat for hours. Cold drinks within arm’s reach encourage high-margin repeat beverage orders throughout the afternoon — without a server needing to check in.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="lg9-media" style="aspect-ratio:16/10;"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/IMG_2074.jpeg" alt="LounGenie CHILL — removable ice bucket with locking safe visible in the cabana unit" loading="lazy"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONFIGURATIONS -->
<section class="lg9-section" style="background:#fff;">
  <div class="lg9-shell">
    <div style="max-width:760px;margin:0 auto 24px;text-align:center;">
      <p class="lg9-kicker">Configurations</p>
      <h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="margin:10px 0 14px;">Three configurations to match your operations.</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="lg9-grid-3">
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:28px;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 8px;">Classic</p>
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1.35rem;">Secure storage + comfort</h3>
        <p class="lg9-copy">Waterproof safe, solar USB charging, and removable ice bucket. A practical entry point that solves the most common reasons guests leave the deck early.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:28px;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 8px;">F&B Communication Button</p>
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1.35rem;">Staff alert system included</h3>
        <p class="lg9-copy">Everything in Classic, plus a service call button that routes alerts to a dedicated touchscreen monitor — so staff know exactly which cabana needs attention.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:28px;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 8px;">2.0</p>
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1.35rem;">Full QR ordering capability</h3>
        <p class="lg9-copy">The most complete configuration. QR codes at the seat print orders on a dedicated PoolSafe printer. Combines every feature of the Classic and F&B Communication models into one seamless guest experience.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- OPERATOR TESTIMONIALS -->
<section class="lg9-section-soft">
  <div class="lg9-shell">
    <div style="max-width:760px;margin:0 auto 24px;text-align:center;">
      <p class="lg9-kicker">In Their Own Words</p>
      <h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="margin:10px 0 14px;">What operators say after deploying the LounGenie.</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="lg9-grid-2" style="align-items:start;">
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:26px;">
        <blockquote style="margin:0 0 16px;font-size:1.08rem;line-height:1.85;color:#1c2e43;">“Our guests now feel they can safely secure their items in the Pool Safe, and the Food & Beverage call button for service has enhanced our poolside experience by improving service response times.”</blockquote>
        <p style="margin:0;color:#4a6079;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;">Kamiya Woodard<br><span style="font-weight:600;">Director of Guest Experience, Orlando World Center Marriott</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:26px;">
        <blockquote style="margin:0 0 16px;font-size:1.08rem;line-height:1.85;color:#1c2e43;">“Since launch, we have far exceeded our budgeted goals, and the revenue share has been the largest part of that success.”</blockquote>
        <p style="margin:0;color:#4a6079;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;">Raymond Weissert<br><span style="font-weight:600;">Director of Operations, The Grove Resort & Waterpark</span></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- BOTTOM CTA -->
<section class="lg9-section" style="background:#fff;">
  <div class="lg9-shell">
    <div class="lg9-card lg9-callout" style="padding:30px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d1b2a,#123559 55%,#0055a5);border:none;">
      <div class="lg9-grid-2" style="align-items:center;">
        <div>
          <p class="lg9-kicker" style="color:#8ad8ff;margin:0 0 8px;">Zero Upfront Cost</p>
          <h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="color:#fff;margin:0 0 10px;">We install the LounGenie. We service it. You keep the revenue.</h2>
          <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);line-height:1.82;margin:0;">PoolSafe handles the hardware, flies to your property for installation, and manages all ongoing service. Your property earns incremental F&B revenue from Day 1.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right;">
          <div class="lg9-btns" style="justify-content:flex-end;">
            <a class="lg9-btn-primary" href="https://www.loungenie.com/index.php/contact-loungenie/">Get Your Free Revenue Projection</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
</div>

excerpt.rendered: Explore LounGenie features including QR ordering, waterproof storage, solar charging, and removable cooling built for premium outdoor hospitality seating.

title.rendered: LounGenie | Smart Poolside Revenue & Guest Experience Platform

<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap');
:root {
    --lg-bg: #f2f7fb;
  --lg-surface: #ffffff;
    --lg-ink: #0b1726;
        --lg-ink-soft: #2f455c;
  --lg-line: #dbe6ef;
    --lg-blue: #004b93;
    --lg-cyan: #00a8dd;
    --lg-navy: #07111d;
    --lg-midnight: #0a1d33;
}
html, body { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif !important; font-size: 16px; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
h1, h2, h3, h4, .lg9-title, .lg9-title-md { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', 'Manrope', sans-serif !important; }
.page-id-4701 .wp-block-post-title,
.page-id-2989 .wp-block-post-title,

.page-id-5651 .entry-title,
.page-id-5686 .entry-title,

.lg9 { color: var(--lg-ink); overflow-x: hidden; }
.lg9 * { box-sizing: border-box; }
.lg9 a { text-decoration: none; }
.lg9 img { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
.lg9-shell { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
.lg9-narrow { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
.lg9-kicker { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2.4px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--lg-cyan); }
.lg9-title { font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5.8vw, 5.4rem); line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -2px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; }
.lg9-title-md { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.2vw, 3.5rem); line-height: 1.06; letter-spacing: -1.2px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; }
.lg9-copy { color: var(--lg-ink-soft); line-height: 1.82; font-size: 1.08rem; }
.lg9-hero-lead { font-size: clamp(1.02rem, 1.6vw, 1.15rem); line-height: 1.88; max-width: 720px; }
.lg9-divider { height: 56px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(0,75,147,.08) 100%); clip-path: polygon(0 25%, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%); }
.lg9-btns { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; }
.lg9-btn-primary, .lg9-btn-secondary { position:relative; overflow:hidden; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; padding:14px 22px; min-height: 50px; border-radius:12px; font-weight:800; font-size:15px; line-height:1.1; transition: transform .22s ease, box-shadow .22s ease, background .22s ease; }
.lg9-btn-primary::before, .lg9-btn-secondary::before { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; left:-120%; width:90%; height:100%; background:linear-gradient(105deg, transparent 0%, rgba(255,255,255,.22) 48%, transparent 100%); transition:left .45s ease; }
.lg9-btn-primary:hover::before, .lg9-btn-secondary:hover::before { left:130%; }
.lg9-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--lg-blue), var(--lg-cyan)); color:#fff; box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(0,75,147,.28); }
.lg9-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0,75,147,.36); }
.lg9-btn-secondary { border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.46); color:#fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); }
.lg9-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.22); }
.lg9-card { background: var(--lg-surface); border:1px solid var(--lg-line); border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(13,27,42,.08); transition: transform .22s ease, box-shadow .22s ease; }
.lg9-card > :first-child { margin-top: 0 !important; }
.lg9-card > :last-child { margin-bottom: 0 !important; }
.lg9-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 22px 50px rgba(13,27,42,.12); }
.lg9-media { overflow:hidden; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 22px 52px rgba(13,27,42,.14); }
.lg9-media img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition: transform .55s ease; }
.lg9-media:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
.lg9-grid-2 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(22px, 3vw, 28px); }
.lg9-grid-3 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(18px, 2.2vw, 22px); }
.lg9-logo-strip { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; gap:20px 36px; align-items:center; }
.lg9-logo-strip img { max-height:52px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter: grayscale(100%) opacity(.75); }
/* Marquee / infinite ticker */
.lg9-marquee-wrap { overflow:hidden; width:100%; position:relative; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before, .lg9-marquee-wrap::after { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0; width:80px; z-index:2; pointer-events:none; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before { left:0; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::after  { right:0; background:linear-gradient(270deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-track { display:flex; width:max-content; animation: lg9Marquee 38s linear infinite; will-change: transform; }
.lg9-marquee-track:hover { animation-play-state: paused; }
.lg9-marquee-inner { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:52px; padding:0 26px; }
.lg9-marquee-inner img { max-height:50px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter:grayscale(100%) opacity(.68); transition:filter .2s ease; }
.lg9-marquee-inner img:hover { filter:grayscale(0%) opacity(1); }
@keyframes lg9Marquee { from { transform:translateX(0); } to { transform:translateX(-50%); } }
.lg9-hero { position: relative; min-height: 84vh; display:flex; align-items:center; background:#09131f; }
.lg9-hero-bg { position:absolute; inset:0; }
.lg9-hero-bg img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; opacity:.4; }
.lg9-hero-overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; background: linear-gradient(112deg, rgba(8,18,29,.97) 0%, rgba(10,30,50,.9) 52%, rgba(0,85,165,.62) 100%); }
.lg9-hero-inner { position:relative; z-index:2; width:100%; padding: 88px 0 76px; }
.lg9-hero-inner p { color: rgba(255,255,255,.9) !important; }
.lg9-hero-inner .lg9-stat-panel p { color: #1c2e43 !important; }

            <p style="margin:4px 0 0;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);font-size:15px;">No wiring, no permits, no downtime. Our team comes to your property.</p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <p style="margin:0;font-weight:800;color:#fff;font-size:15px;">3. You earn from Day 1.</p>
            <p style="margin:4px 0 0;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);font-size:15px;">New F&B revenue starts from the first day guests interact with the units.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="lg9-btns" style="margin-top:22px;">
          <a class="lg9-btn-primary" href="https://www.loungenie.com/index.php/contact-loungenie/">Get Your Free Revenue Projection</a>
          <a class="lg9-btn-secondary" href="https://www.loungenie.com/index.php/poolside-amenity-unit/">See Full Feature Set</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

</div>

<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap');

}

.lg9 { color: var(--lg-ink); overflow-x: hidden; }
.lg9 * { box-sizing: border-box; }
.lg9 a { text-decoration: none; }
.lg9 img { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
.lg9-shell { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
.lg9-narrow { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
.lg9-kicker { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2.4px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--lg-cyan); }
.lg9-title { font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5.8vw, 5.4rem); line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -2px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; }
.lg9-title-md { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.2vw, 3.5rem); line-height: 1.06; letter-spacing: -1.2px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; }
.lg9-copy { color: var(--lg-ink-soft); line-height: 1.82; font-size: 1.08rem; }
.lg9-hero-lead { font-size: clamp(1.02rem, 1.6vw, 1.15rem); line-height: 1.88; max-width: 720px; }
.lg9-divider { height: 56px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(0,75,147,.08) 100%); clip-path: polygon(0 25%, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%); }
.lg9-btns { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; }
.lg9-btn-primary, .lg9-btn-secondary { position:relative; overflow:hidden; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; padding:14px 22px; min-height: 50px; border-radius:12px; font-weight:800; font-size:15px; line-height:1.1; transition: transform .22s ease, box-shadow .22s ease, background .22s ease; }
.lg9-btn-primary::before, .lg9-btn-secondary::before { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; left:-120%; width:90%; height:100%; background:linear-gradient(105deg, transparent 0%, rgba(255,255,255,.22) 48%, transparent 100%); transition:left .45s ease; }
.lg9-btn-primary:hover::before, .lg9-btn-secondary:hover::before { left:130%; }
.lg9-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--lg-blue), var(--lg-cyan)); color:#fff; box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(0,75,147,.28); }
.lg9-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0,75,147,.36); }
.lg9-btn-secondary { border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.46); color:#fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); }
.lg9-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.22); }
.lg9-card { background: var(--lg-surface); border:1px solid var(--lg-line); border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(13,27,42,.08); transition: transform .22s ease, box-shadow .22s ease; }
.lg9-card > :first-child { margin-top: 0 !important; }
.lg9-card > :last-child { margin-bottom: 0 !important; }
.lg9-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 22px 50px rgba(13,27,42,.12); }
.lg9-media { overflow:hidden; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 22px 52px rgba(13,27,42,.14); }
.lg9-media img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition: transform .55s ease; }
.lg9-media:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
.lg9-grid-2 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(22px, 3vw, 28px); }
.lg9-grid-3 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(18px, 2.2vw, 22px); }
.lg9-logo-strip { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; gap:20px 36px; align-items:center; }
.lg9-logo-strip img { max-height:52px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter: grayscale(100%) opacity(.75); }
/* Marquee / infinite ticker */
.lg9-marquee-wrap { overflow:hidden; width:100%; position:relative; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before, .lg9-marquee-wrap::after { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0; width:80px; z-index:2; pointer-events:none; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before { left:0; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::after  { right:0; background:linear-gradient(270deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-track { display:flex; width:max-content; animation: lg9Marquee 38s linear infinite; will-change: transform; }
.lg9-marquee-track:hover { animation-play-state: paused; }
.lg9-marquee-inner { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:52px; padding:0 26px; }
.lg9-marquee-inner img { max-height:50px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter:grayscale(100%) opacity(.68); transition:filter .2s ease; }
.lg9-marquee-inner img:hover { filter:grayscale(0%) opacity(1); }
@keyframes lg9Marquee { from { transform:translateX(0); } to { transform:translateX(-50%); } }
.lg9-hero { position: relative; min-height: 84vh; display:flex; align-items:center; background:#09131f; }
.lg9-hero-bg { position:absolute; inset:0; }
.lg9-hero-bg img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; opacity:.4; }
.lg9-hero-overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; background: linear-gradient(112deg, rgba(8,18,29,.97) 0%, rgba(10,30,50,.9) 52%, rgba(0,85,165,.62) 100%); }
.lg9-hero-inner { position:relative; z-index:2; width:100%; padding: 88px 0 76px; }
.lg9-hero-inner p { color: rgba(255,255,255,.9) !important; }
.lg9-hero-inner .lg9-stat-panel p { color: #1c2e43 !important; }
.lg9-stat-panel { background: rgba(255,255,255,.94); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4); border-radius: 24px; padding: 20px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); }
.lg9-stat-big { font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 6vw, 4.8rem); line-height: 1; font-weight: 900; color: var(--lg-ink); }
.lg9-section { padding: clamp(60px, 7vw, 82px) 0; }
.lg9-section-soft { padding: clamp(60px, 7vw, 82px) 0; background: var(--lg-bg); }
.lg9-callout { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.lg9-callout::after { content:""; position:absolute; inset:auto -10% -40% auto; width:240px; height:240px; border-radius:999px; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(138,216,255,.18) 0%, rgba(138,216,255,0) 70%); pointer-events:none; }
.lg9-step { display:flex; gap: 14px; align-items:flex-start; }
.lg9-step-num { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lg-blue),var(--lg-cyan)); color:#fff; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-weight:800; flex-shrink:0; transition: transform .2s ease; }
.lg9-step:hover .lg9-step-num { transform: scale(1.08); }
.lg9-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:7px 12px; border-radius:999px; background:#e8f4ff; color: var(--lg-blue); font-size:12px; font-weight:800; }
.lg9-pill::before { content: ""; width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:999px; background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lg-blue),var(--lg-cyan)); }
.lg9-form-note { font-size: 13px; color: #3f5873; margin-top: 12px; }
.lg9-card blockquote { border-left: 3px solid rgba(0,168,221,.4); padding-left: 16px; }
.lg9-video-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr)); gap: 22px; }
.lg9-video-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid var(--lg-line); border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(13,27,42,.08); }
.lg9-frame { aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; background:#09131f; }
.lg9-frame iframe { width:100%; height:100%; border:0; display:block; }
.lg9-video-hero { display:grid; gap: 18px; }
@media (min-width: 901px) { .lg9-video-hero { grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr; align-items: start; } }
.lg9-video-feature { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #0a1727 0%, #112f4f 55%, #0d4f95 100%); border-radius: 24px; padding: 12px; box-shadow: 0 26px 60px rgba(9, 27, 45, .22); }
.lg9-video-feature .lg9-frame { border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 16 / 8.7; }
.lg9-video-hero-copy { background: #ffffff; color: var(--lg-ink); border-radius: 20px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #deebf6; box-shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(9, 27, 45, .08); }
.lg9-video-hero-copy .lg9-copy { color: var(--lg-ink-soft); }
.lg9-video-meta { display:grid; gap: 12px; margin-top: 18px; }
.lg9-video-meta-card { padding: 14px 16px; border-radius: 16px; background: #f4f9ff; border: 1px solid #dbe9f7; }
.lg9-video-meta-card strong { display:block; margin-bottom: 4px; color: #14314b; }
.lg9-video-library-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:end; gap:18px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom: 22px; }
.lg9-video-card-body { padding:18px 18px 20px; }
.lg9-video-card-body strong { display:block; margin-bottom:6px; }
.lg9-gallery { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap:18px; }
.lg9-gallery .lg9-media { aspect-ratio: 16 / 12; }
.lg9-gallery--mosaic .lg9-media:nth-child(3n+1) { aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; }
.lg9-gallery--mosaic .lg9-media:nth-child(3n+2) { aspect-ratio: 4 / 5; }
.lg9-gallery--mosaic .lg9-media:nth-child(3n+3) { aspect-ratio: 16 / 12; }
.lg9-gallery-band { display:grid; gap: 18px; }
.lg9-gallery-lead { display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1.35fr .9fr; gap: 18px; align-items: stretch; }

.lg9-gallery-caption { display:grid; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; }

.lg9-topbar-inner { max-width:1280px; margin:0 auto; padding:8px 24px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:14px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.wp-site-blocks > header.wp-block-template-part { position: sticky; top:0; z-index: 990; background: rgba(255,255,255,.94); border-bottom:1px solid #dce8f2; backdrop-filter: blur(13px); }

.wp-site-blocks > header .wp-block-navigation-item__content:hover { background:#edf6ff; color:var(--lg-blue) !important; }

.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer { background: radial-gradient(130% 160% at 0% 0%, #133b62 0%, #081624 52%, #050e1a 100%); color:rgba(255,255,255,.82); padding: 44px 24px 20px; }

.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer a { color:rgba(255,255,255,.88); }
.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer a:hover { color:#9ddfff; }
.wp-site-blocks > footer .lg9-footer-base { max-width:1280px; margin:16px auto 0; padding-top:12px; border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); font-size:12px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.58); display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.lg9-footer-chip-wrap { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; margin-top:14px; }
.lg9-footer-chip { padding:7px 10px; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2); color:rgba(255,255,255,.88); font-size:12px; }
.lg9-footer-cta { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin-top:14px; padding:10px 14px; border-radius:10px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f4f92,#0f76c2); color:#fff !important; font-weight:800; font-size:13px; }
.lg9-hero-trust { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px 22px; margin-top:20px; }
.lg9-hero-trust-item { font-size:12.5px; font-weight:700; color:rgba(255,255,255,.72); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; letter-spacing:.1px; }
.lg9-hero-trust-item::before { content:"✓"; color:#4fe8a0; font-size:14px; font-weight:900; }
.lg9-prefooter { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0e2138 0%,#0d3d6b 55%,#0055a5 100%); padding:52px 24px; }
.lg9-prefooter-inner { max-width:1280px; margin:0 auto; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:28px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.lg9-prefooter-copy { flex:1 1 380px; }
.lg9 .lg9-section, .lg9 .lg9-section-soft { animation: lg9FadeUp .75s ease both; }
.lg9 .lg9-section:nth-of-type(2), .lg9 .lg9-section-soft:nth-of-type(2) { animation-delay: .08s; }
.lg9 .lg9-section:nth-of-type(3), .lg9 .lg9-section-soft:nth-of-type(3) { animation-delay: .14s; }
.lg9 .lg9-section:nth-of-type(4), .lg9 .lg9-section-soft:nth-of-type(4) { animation-delay: .2s; }
.lg9-grid-3 > .lg9-card { animation: lg9FadeUp .65s ease both; }
.lg9-grid-3 > .lg9-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: .09s; }
.lg9-grid-3 > .lg9-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: .16s; }
.lg9-hero-bg img { animation: lg9HeroZoom 8s ease-out both; }
@keyframes lg9FadeUp {
    from { opacity:0; transform: translateY(16px); }
    to { opacity:1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
@keyframes lg9HeroZoom {
    from { transform: scale(1.08); }
    to { transform: scale(1); }
}

.ir-shell {
    background: radial-gradient(130% 120% at 100% 0%, #edf6ff 0%, #f8fbff 46%, #ecf3fb 100%);
    color: var(--lg-ink);
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 360px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    padding: 74px 0 102px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #0c1d30;
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero-bg,
.ir-shell .ir-hero-bg img {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero-bg img {
    object-fit: cover;
    opacity: .36;
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(118deg, rgba(5,16,28,.94) 0%, rgba(9,34,60,.86) 56%, rgba(0,85,165,.56) 100%);
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero-inner {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero h1 {
    color: #fff;
    margin: 10px 0 12px;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.8vw, 3.5rem);
    line-height: 1.03;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
}

.ir-shell .ir-hero p {
    margin: 0;
    max-width: 820px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,.86);
    line-height: 1.78;
    font-size: 1.02rem;
}

.ir-shell .ir-content-wrap {
    max-width: 1220px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 24px 84px;
}

.ir-shell .ir-content-panel {
    margin-top: -64px;
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid #dbe7f2;
    border-radius: 24px;
    box-shadow: 0 24px 56px rgba(7, 27, 47, .12);
    padding: clamp(22px, 2.6vw, 34px);
}

.ir-shell .ir-toolbar {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;

<div class="lg9">

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="lg9-hero" style="min-height:54vh;">
  <div class="lg9-hero-bg"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/lg-about-westin-hilton-head-scaled.jpg" alt="LounGenie deployment at The Grove Resort & Waterpark" fetchpriority="high"></div>
  <div class="lg9-hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="lg9-hero-inner">
    <div class="lg9-shell">
      <p class="lg9-kicker">About LounGenie</p>
      <h1 class="lg9-title-md" style="color:#fff;margin:10px 0 14px;">Built In Canada. Installed And Serviced By PoolSafe.</h1>
      <p style="max-width:860px;line-height:1.85;color:rgba(255,255,255,.88);">PoolSafe Inc. (TSX-V: POOL) designs and builds the LounGenie, the award-winning cabana amenity that lets guests order food, charge their phone, and lock up valuables right from their seat. We work with hotels, resorts, waterparks, and cruise lines worldwide to help them earn more from their pool decks.</p>
      <div class="lg9-hero-trust">
        <span class="lg9-hero-trust-item">IAAPA Brass Ring Award Recipient</span>
        <span class="lg9-hero-trust-item">TSX-V: POOL</span>
        <span class="lg9-hero-trust-item">$0 Upfront Model</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- COMPANY STORY + IMAGE -->
<section class="lg9-section-soft">
  <div class="lg9-shell lg9-grid-2" style="align-items:start;">
    <div>
      <p class="lg9-kicker">Our Story</p>
      <h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="font-size:2rem;margin:10px 0 12px;">Built to solve poolside revenue leakage.</h2>
      <p class="lg9-copy">PoolSafe Inc. was founded to solve one of the most persistent revenue leaks in outdoor hospitality: guests who leave the deck. When valuables feel exposed, phones die, and ordering requires a walk to the bar, guests spend less and leave earlier. The LounGenie addresses all three at the seat without adding complexity to operations.</p>
      <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin-top:14px;">Designed and built in North York, Ontario, the LounGenie is a commercial-grade hospitality unit deployed across leading waterparks, hotels, resorts, and cruise lines. PoolSafe installs and services the units at zero upfront cost to the property.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="lg9-media" style="aspect-ratio:4/3;"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/lg-home-hero-the-grove-7-scaled.jpg" alt="Premium resort cabana with LounGenie installed" loading="lazy"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MISSION + VISION + IAAPA AWARD -->
<section class="lg9-section" style="background:#fff;">
  <div class="lg9-shell" style="display:grid;gap:22px;">
    <div class="lg9-grid-3">
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 8px;">Mission</p>
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1.2rem;">Unlock new revenue opportunities.</h3>
        <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:0;">At PoolSafe Inc., we help hotels and waterparks earn more at the pool while giving guests a better experience. We build smart, practical cabana units that work out of the box — no extra staff, no added complexity.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 8px;">Vision</p>
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1.2rem;">As essential as a hotel wall safe.</h3>
        <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:0;">PoolSafe Inc. envisions a future where the LounGenie is as essential to a pool deck as a wall safe is to a hotel room, a standard guest amenity that operators and guests both expect.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0e2138,#0f365a 55%,#0055a5);border:none;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="color:#91ddff;margin:0 0 8px;">IAAPA Brass Ring Award</p>
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1.2rem;color:#fff;">Award-Winning Innovation</h3>
        <p style="margin:0;color:rgba(255,255,255,.88);line-height:1.78;font-size:15px;">The IAAPA Brass Ring Award is one of the highest honors in the attractions and hospitality industry. PoolSafe Inc. received this recognition for developing a solution that measurably enhances the guest experience while delivering operational and revenue impact for operators.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PARTNER QUOTES -->
<section class="lg9-section-soft">
  <div class="lg9-shell">
    <div style="max-width:760px;margin:0 auto 24px;text-align:center;">
      <p class="lg9-kicker">Partner Testimonials</p>
      <h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="margin:10px 0 14px;">What operators report after rolling out the LounGenie.</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="lg9-grid-2" style="align-items:start;">
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:26px;">
        <blockquote style="margin:0 0 16px;font-size:1.06rem;line-height:1.85;color:#1c2e43;">“We have had a great season and are pleased to say that your PoolSafe product played a big part in that success. Our guests love the convenience and value it provides to their cabana rentals. We’ve seen a positive impact on our F&B sales, and because of this success, we are planning to add new VIP seating locations for the next season to accommodate more of your units.”</blockquote>
        <p style="margin:0;color:#4a6079;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;">Bobby Covach<br><span style="font-weight:600;">Cabana/Food & Beverage Director, Cowabunga Bay Waterpark</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:26px;">
        <blockquote style="margin:0 0 16px;font-size:1.06rem;line-height:1.85;color:#1c2e43;">“Since the launch of the product, we have far exceeded our budgeted goals and the revenue share has been the largest part of that success.”</blockquote>
        <p style="margin:0;color:#4a6079;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;">Raymond Weissert<br><span style="font-weight:600;">Director of Operations, The Grove Resort & Waterpark</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:26px;">
        <blockquote style="margin:0 0 16px;font-size:1.06rem;line-height:1.85;color:#1c2e43;">“The overall sense of security our guests now feel, knowing they can safely secure their items in the Pool Safe, and the Food & Beverage call button for service have enhanced our poolside experience.”</blockquote>
        <p style="margin:0;color:#4a6079;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;">Kamiya Woodard<br><span style="font-weight:600;">Director of Guest Experience, Orlando World Center Marriott</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:26px;">
        <blockquote style="margin:0 0 16px;font-size:1.06rem;line-height:1.85;color:#1c2e43;">“The convenience of having a safe, charging port, and ice bucket inside each cabana with the elegant look and feel of the Pool Safes enabled us to take our cabana experience to the next level.”</blockquote>
        <p style="margin:0;color:#4a6079;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;">Louis R. Cirigliano Jr.<br><span style="font-weight:600;">Director of Operations, Breakwater Beach</span></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CTA -->
<section class="lg9-section" style="background:#fff;">
  <div class="lg9-shell">
    <div class="lg9-card lg9-callout" style="padding:30px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d1b2a,#123559 55%,#0055a5);border:none;">
      <div class="lg9-grid-2" style="align-items:center;">
        <div>
          <p class="lg9-kicker" style="color:#8ad8ff;margin:0 0 8px;">Zero Upfront Cost</p>
          <h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="color:#fff;margin:0 0 10px;">Ready to bring the LounGenie to your property?</h2>
          <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);line-height:1.82;margin:0;">We assess your layout, handle full installation, and manage all ongoing service. You earn incremental F&B revenue from Day 1, with no upfront capital outlay.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right;">
          <div class="lg9-btns" style="justify-content:flex-end;">
            <a class="lg9-btn-primary" href="https://www.loungenie.com/index.php/contact-loungenie/">Get Your Free Revenue Projection</a>
            <a class="lg9-btn-secondary" href="https://www.loungenie.com/index.php/poolside-amenity-unit/">Explore Features</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

</div>

<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap');
:root {

  --lg-surface: #ffffff;
    --lg-ink: #0b1726;
        --lg-ink-soft: #2f455c;
  --lg-line: #dbe6ef;
    --lg-blue: #004b93;
    --lg-cyan: #00a8dd;
    --lg-navy: #07111d;
    --lg-midnight: #0a1d33;
}
html, body { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif !important; font-size: 16px; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
h1, h2, h3, h4, .lg9-title, .lg9-title-md { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', 'Manrope', sans-serif !important; }
.page-id-4701 .wp-block-post-title,

.lg9 { color: var(--lg-ink); overflow-x: hidden; }
.lg9 * { box-sizing: border-box; }
.lg9 a { text-decoration: none; }
.lg9 img { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
.lg9-shell { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
.lg9-narrow { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
.lg9-kicker { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2.4px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--lg-cyan); }
.lg9-title { font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5.8vw, 5.4rem); line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -2px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; }
.lg9-title-md { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.2vw, 3.5rem); line-height: 1.06; letter-spacing: -1.2px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; }
.lg9-copy { color: var(--lg-ink-soft); line-height: 1.82; font-size: 1.08rem; }
.lg9-hero-lead { font-size: clamp(1.02rem, 1.6vw, 1.15rem); line-height: 1.88; max-width: 720px; }
.lg9-divider { height: 56px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(0,75,147,.08) 100%); clip-path: polygon(0 25%, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%); }
.lg9-btns { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; }
.lg9-btn-primary, .lg9-btn-secondary { position:relative; overflow:hidden; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; padding:14px 22px; min-height: 50px; border-radius:12px; font-weight:800; font-size:15px; line-height:1.1; transition: transform .22s ease, box-shadow .22s ease, background .22s ease; }
.lg9-btn-primary::before, .lg9-btn-secondary::before { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; left:-120%; width:90%; height:100%; background:linear-gradient(105deg, transparent 0%, rgba(255,255,255,.22) 48%, transparent 100%); transition:left .45s ease; }
.lg9-btn-primary:hover::before, .lg9-btn-secondary:hover::before { left:130%; }
.lg9-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--lg-blue), var(--lg-cyan)); color:#fff; box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(0,75,147,.28); }
.lg9-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0,75,147,.36); }
.lg9-btn-secondary { border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.46); color:#fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); }
.lg9-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.22); }
.lg9-card { background: var(--lg-surface); border:1px solid var(--lg-line); border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(13,27,42,.08); transition: transform .22s ease, box-shadow .22s ease; }
.lg9-card > :first-child { margin-top: 0 !important; }
.lg9-card > :last-child { margin-bottom: 0 !important; }
.lg9-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 22px 50px rgba(13,27,42,.12); }
.lg9-media { overflow:hidden; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 22px 52px rgba(13,27,42,.14); }
.lg9-media img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition: transform .55s ease; }
.lg9-media:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
.lg9-grid-2 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(22px, 3vw, 28px); }
.lg9-grid-3 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(18px, 2.2vw, 22px); }
.lg9-logo-strip { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; gap:20px 36px; align-items:center; }
.lg9-logo-strip img { max-height:52px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter: grayscale(100%) opacity(.75); }
/* Marquee / infinite ticker */
.lg9-marquee-wrap { overflow:hidden; width:100%; position:relative; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before, .lg9-marquee-wrap::after { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0; width:80px; z-index:2; pointer-events:none; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before { left:0; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::after  { right:0; background:linear-gradient(270deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-track { display:flex; width:max-content; animation: lg9Marquee 38s linear infinite; will-change: transform; }
.lg9-marquee-track:hover { animation-play-state: paused; }
.lg9-marquee-inner { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:52px; padding:0 26px; }
.lg9-marquee-inner img { max-height:50px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter:grayscale(100%) opacity(.68); transition:filter .2s ease; }
.lg9-marquee-inner img:hover { filter:grayscale(0%) opacity(1); }
@keyframes lg9Marquee { from { transform:translateX(0); } to { transform:translateX(-50%); } }
.lg9-hero { position: relative; min-height: 84vh; display:flex; align-items:center; background:#09131f; }
.lg9-hero-bg { position:absolute; inset:0; }
.lg9-hero-bg img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; opacity:.4; }
.lg9-hero-overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; background: linear-gradient(112deg, rgba(8,18,29,.97) 0%, rgba(10,30,50,.9) 52%, rgba(0,85,165,.62) 100%); }
.lg9-hero-inner { position:relative; z-index:2; width:100%; padding: 88px 0 76px; }
.lg9-hero-inner p { color: rgba(255,255,255,.9) !important; }
.lg9-hero-inner .lg9-stat-panel p { color: #1c2e43 !important; }
.lg9-stat-panel { background: rgba(255,255,255,.94); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4); border-radius: 24px; padding: 20px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); }
.lg9-stat-big { font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 6vw, 4.8rem); line-height: 1; font-weight: 900; color: var(--lg-ink); }
.lg9-section { padding: clamp(60px, 7vw, 82px) 0; }
.lg9-section-soft { padding: clamp(60px, 7vw, 82px) 0; background: var(--lg-bg); }
.lg9-callout { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.lg9-callout::after { content:""; position:absolute; inset:auto -10% -40% auto; width:240px; height:240px; border-radius:999px; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(138,216,255,.18) 0%, rgba(138,216,255,0) 70%); pointer-events:none; }
.lg9-step { display:flex; gap: 14px; align-items:flex-start; }
.lg9-step-num { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lg-blue),var(--lg-cyan)); color:#fff; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-weight:800; flex-shrink:0; transition: transform .2s ease; }

      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 8px;">2. Revenue Projection</p>
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1.25rem;">You get a property-specific commercial view.</h3>
        <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:0;">We walk through deployment scale, seating mix, guest behavior, and where the LounGenie can support higher dwell time and stronger food and beverage conversion.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 8px;">3. Rollout Plan</p>
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1.25rem;">PoolSafe handles installation and service.</h3>
        <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:0;">No wiring, no permits, no upfront capital. We coordinate installation, branding, and ongoing service so your team can stay focused on operations.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="lg9-section-soft">
  <div class="lg9-shell lg9-grid-2" style="align-items:start;">
    <div>
      <p class="lg9-kicker">Request Demo</p>
      <h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="font-size:2rem;margin:10px 0 18px;">Start the conversation.</h2>
      <div class="lg9-card lg9-callout" style="padding:28px;">
        <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:0 0 20px;">Complete the form and our team will respond within one business day with a tailored revenue projection for your property.</p>
        <div id="lg9-hubspot-form"></div>
        <script>(function(){var s=document.createElement('script');s.charset='utf-8';s.src='//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js';s.onload=function(){hbspt.forms.create({region:'na1',portalId:'21854204',formId:'60812333-d602-4875-bd0a-9c2b043c7d95',target:'#lg9-hubspot-form'});};document.head.appendChild(s);}());</script>
        <p class="lg9-form-note">If the form does not load, email <a href="mailto:info@poolsafeinc.com">info@poolsafeinc.com</a>.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;gap:18px;">
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 8px;">Why operators reach out</p>
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1.25rem;">They want premium seating to perform like premium seating.</h3>
        <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:0;">The LounGenie helps properties turn passive seat inventory into a stronger guest-experience product with better commercial performance attached to it.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 8px;">Direct Contact</p>
        <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:0;">PoolSafe Inc.<br>906 Magnetic Drive, North York, ON M3J 2C4, Canada</p>
        <p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:10px 0 0;"><a href="tel:+14166302444" style="color:var(--lg-blue);font-weight:700;">416-630-2444</a><br><a href="mailto:info@poolsafeinc.com" style="color:var(--lg-blue);font-weight:700;">info@poolsafeinc.com</a></p>
      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 8px;">Partner Results</p>
        <blockquote style="margin:0 0 14px;font-size:1.02rem;line-height:1.78;color:#1c2e43;">“The Food & Beverage call button for service has enhanced our poolside experience as well, improving service response times. It has been very convenient for both our staff and our guests.”</blockquote>
        <p style="margin:0;font-weight:700;color:#1c2e43;">Kamiya Woodard</p>
        <p style="margin:4px 0 0;color:#617889;font-size:14px;">Director of Guest Experience, Orlando World Center Marriott</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
</div>

excerpt.rendered: Contact LounGenie to request a demo, discuss deployment timing, and review projected revenue impact for your property.

<section class="lg9-section" style="background:#fff;padding-bottom:30px;">

          <div class="lg9-media"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/lg-gallery-sea-world-san-diego.jpg" alt="The LounGenie photographed in a premium hospitality setting" loading="lazy"></div>

        <div class="lg9-media"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/IMG_2073.jpeg" alt="LounGenie CHARGE — solar-powered USB charging ports at the cabana seat" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="lg9-media"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/IMG_2074.jpeg" alt="LounGenie CHILL — removable ice bucket with locking safe visible in the cabana unit" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="lg9-media"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/IMG_2075.jpeg" alt="LounGenie STASH — waterproof keypad and safe lock close-up" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="lg9-media"><img decoding="async" src="https://www.loungenie.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/IMG_2076.jpeg" alt="LounGenie full unit — waterproof locking safe, USB charging ports, and removable ice bucket" loading="lazy"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:26px;">

      <blockquote style="margin:0 0 14px;font-size:1.04rem;line-height:1.82;color:#1c2e43;">“Since the launch of the product, we have far exceeded our budgeted goals and the revenue share has been the largest part of that success.”</blockquote>
      <p style="margin:0;font-weight:700;color:#1c2e43;">Raymond Weissert</p>

    <div class="lg9-grid-3">

      </div>
      <div class="lg9-card" style="padding:24px;">
        <p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 10px;">Operator Result</p>
        <blockquote style="margin:0 0 14px;font-size:1.02rem;line-height:1.78;color:#1c2e43;">“Our guests love the convenience and value it provides to their cabana rentals. We’ve seen a positive impact on our F&B sales.”</blockquote>
        <p style="margin:0;font-weight:700;color:#1c2e43;">Bobby Covach</p>

<style>
.lg9-lb { display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:9999; background:rgba(5,14,26,.94); align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:zoom-out; backdrop-filter:blur(6px); }
.lg9-lb.is-open { display:flex; animation:lg9LbFade .22s ease; }
.lg9-lb-img { max-width:min(94vw,1400px); max-height:90vh; object-fit:contain; border-radius:14px; box-shadow:0 42px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.6); animation:lg9LbIn .28s ease; cursor:default; }
.lg9-lb-close { position:absolute; top:18px; right:22px; width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:999px; background:rgba(5,14,26,.72); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.52); color:#fff; font-size:22px; line-height:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s; }
.lg9-lb-close:hover { background:rgba(5,14,26,.9); }
.lg9-lb-caption { position:absolute; bottom:22px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); color:rgba(255,255,255,.78); font-size:13px; font-family:'Manrope',sans-serif; background:rgba(0,0,0,.52); padding:7px 18px; border-radius:999px; max-width:80vw; text-align:center; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; pointer-events:none; }
@keyframes lg9LbFade { from { opacity:0; } to { opacity:1; } }
@keyframes lg9LbIn { from { opacity:0; transform:scale(.93); } to { opacity:1; transform:scale(1); } }
.lg9-gallery .lg9-media img { cursor:zoom-in; }
</style>

<dialog class="lg9-lb" id="lg9Lb" aria-label="Photo lightbox">
  <button class="lg9-lb-close" id="lg9LbClose" aria-label="Close lightbox">✕</button>
  <img decoding="async" class="lg9-lb-img" id="lg9LbImg" src="" alt="LounGenie">
  <div class="lg9-lb-caption" id="lg9LbCap"></div>
</dialog>
<script>
(function(){
  var lb=document.getElementById('lg9Lb'),
      lbImg=document.getElementById('lg9LbImg'),
      lbCap=document.getElementById('lg9LbCap'),
      lbClose=document.getElementById('lg9LbClose');
  function open(src,alt){
    lbImg.src=src; lbImg.alt=alt;
    lbCap.textContent=alt;
    lb.classList.add('is-open');
    document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
  }
  function close(){
    lb.classList.remove('is-open');
    lbImg.src='';
    document.body.style.overflow='';
  }
  lb.addEventListener('click',function(e){if(e.target===lb)close();});
  lbClose.addEventListener('click',close);
  document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key==='Escape')close();});
  document.querySelectorAll('.lg9-gallery .lg9-media img').forEach(function(img){
    img.addEventListener('click',function(){open(img.src,img.alt);});
  });
})();
</script>

<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap');

.lg9-btn-primary::before, .lg9-btn-secondary::before { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; left:-120%; width:90%; height:100%; background:linear-gradient(105deg, transparent 0%, rgba(255,255,255,.22) 48%, transparent 100%); transition:left .45s ease; }
.lg9-btn-primary:hover::before, .lg9-btn-secondary:hover::before { left:130%; }
.lg9-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--lg-blue), var(--lg-cyan)); color:#fff; box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(0,75,147,.28); }

.lg9-media img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition: transform .55s ease; }

.lg9-grid-2 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(22px, 3vw, 28px); }
.lg9-grid-3 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(18px, 2.2vw, 22px); }
.lg9-logo-strip { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; gap:20px 36px; align-items:center; }
.lg9-logo-strip img { max-height:52px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter: grayscale(100%) opacity(.75); }
/* Marquee / infinite ticker */
.lg9-marquee-wrap { overflow:hidden; width:100%; position:relative; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before, .lg9-marquee-wrap::after { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0; width:80px; z-index:2; pointer-events:none; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before { left:0; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::after  { right:0; background:linear-gradient(270deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-track { display:flex; width:max-content; animation: lg9Marquee 38s linear infinite; will-change: transform; }
.lg9-marquee-track:hover { animation-play-state: paused; }

.lg9-marquee-inner img { max-height:50px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter:grayscale(100%) opacity(.68); transition:filter .2s ease; }
.lg9-marquee-inner img:hover { filter:grayscale(0%) opacity(1); }
@keyframes lg9Marquee { from { transform:translateX(0); } to { transform:translateX(-50%); } }

.lg9-step { display:flex; gap: 14px; align-items:flex-start; }

.ir-shell {
